sys_update_xml.name: sp_widget_19af2b3883beba107e911530ceaad3e4
sys_update_xml.payload:
customcThere is a list of 5 latest users with a search box beneath them. The list should filter out on the basis of the search box. When the first item(user) in the list is clicked, open a ‘Create Incident‘ record producer. When the second item is clicked, open a new incident form but in the portal itself. When the third item is clicked, open that user record in the platform view. When the fourth item is clicked, open a new user form in the portal itself. When the fifth item is clicked, open a new problem form with short description and description prefilled in the platform view.sp_instancetrue30-01-2026practice4false30-01-2026Practice4falsefalsesp_widgetadmin2026-01-30 11:16:1719af2b3883beba107e911530ceaad3e4430-01-2026Practice4globalglobalsp_widget_19af2b3883beba107e911530ceaad3e4admin2026-01-30 11:43:1719af2b3883beba107e911530ceaad3e4admin2026-01-30 11:16:1715afeb3883beba107e911530ceaad36f0admin2026-01-30 11:16:17sp_widget
true
